build_command: N/A - static site, no build step
verification_instructions: 1. Verify JavaScript syntax is valid using node --check. 2. Verify the logic changes match the intended behavior by code review.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single file JavaScript app
environment_constraints: No build tools required. Validate with node --check keuangan-app.js for syntax.
contribution_requirements: Push to feature/forecast-integration-buttons branch. PR #5 already exists.
key_patterns: Single large keuangan-app.js file (~7000+ lines). Uses KDB abstraction for Firebase. STATUS constants at top. Functions: integrasiPermohonanDanaMasukKeJurnal (manual batch journal), autoJurnalJatuhTempo (auto journal on due date), renderForecastBayar/Terima (forecast views). getFinancialData() calculates saldo from journals. today() returns YYYY-MM-DD string.
directory_structure: Root: index.html (UI), keuangan-app.js (all logic), keuangan-firebase.js (Firebase config), netlify/ (serverless functions), netlify.toml (deploy config)
